metrics.name: DAU
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as dau FROM dwd_user_active_daily WHERE dt = '{{date}}'

metrics.name: 人均使用时长
metrics.sql: SELECT AVG(duration) as avg_duration FROM dws_user_usage_daily WHERE dt = '{{date}}'

metrics.name: 信息流点击率
metrics.sql: SELECT SUM(click_cnt)/SUM(show_cnt) as ctr FROM dws_feed_consume_daily WHERE dt = '{{date}}'

metrics.name: 次日留存率
metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN dt = date_add('{{date}}', 1) THEN user_id END)/COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as retention FROM dwd_user_active_daily WHERE dt = '{{date}}'

report.title: 📊 每日核心指标监控日报
